cli.demo.analysis.background: Three sailors vanished this month; the lighthouse still burns each night.
cli.demo.analysis.clue.tide_table.descri: Three dates circled behind the harbor map.
cli.demo.analysis.clue.tide_table.match_: Three circled dates match the deaths.
cli.demo.analysis.npc.elias.description: The reclusive lighthouse keeper, rarely seen in the village.
cli.demo.analysis.npc.elias.secret: Drowned two years ago; now a Deep One thrall.
cli.demo.analysis.npc.martha.description: A wary innkeeper who has seen too much.
cli.demo.analysis.npc.martha.secret: She glimpsed the keeper's rotting face.
cli.demo.analysis.scene.inn.description: A dim, smoke-stained tavern where villagers fall silent about the lighthouse.
cli.demo.analysis.scene.inn.keeper_notes: Martha will admit the light changed color if pressed.
cli.demo.analysis.summary: Investigators probe three disappearances tied to the Blackmoor lighthouse.
cli.demo.analysis.threat.deep_one.descri: A drowned thing wearing a human face.
cli.demo.analysis.timeline.night1: The lighthouse light turns a sickly green.
cli.demo.analysis.truth.light.descriptio: {sentinel} - the light lures boats onto the rocks so the Deep Ones can feed.
cli.demo.analysis.truth.light.revealed_b: the lamp room full of teeth
cli.demo.fallback: The lantern gutters low. Tell me what you do next.
cli.demo.opening: The Salt & Anchor Inn is dim and smoke-stained. Martha the innkeeper eyes you warily while the other patrons fall silent at the mention of the lighthouse. What do you do?
cli.demo.search_hit: Behind the water-stained harbor map your fingers find a scratched tide table: three dates circled in a shaky hand. A chill settles over you. What next?
cli.demo.search_miss: You run your hands along the desk and the wall, but the smoky gloom hides whatever might be here. Martha watches you a little too closely. What next?
cli.demo.upload_ready: Demo module loaded. Nora Vance is ready at the Salt & Anchor Inn.
cli.combined_listening: Serving networked TUI on {host}:{port} with chat platforms: {platforms}
cli.no_mode: No platform selected. Use --cli for the headless CLI.
cli.offline_demo_notice: No usable LLM credential configured; running offline demo mode.
cli.platform_skip_no_creds: No credentials for platform '{platform}'; skipping (set its TRPG_* env vars).
cli.platforms_stub: Platform assembly is not wired here yet: {platforms}
